ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (0: female, 1: male) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in inches */,
  "hs_diploma" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has a high school diploma (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Number of visits the patient has made */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the diagnosis */,
  "dx" INTEGER /* Diagnosis code */,
  "max_age_at_visit" REAL /* Maximum age of the patient at visit */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosing_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who made the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_diagnosing_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosing_provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the provider */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the provider */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis associated with the treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who administered the treatment */,
  "treatment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "treatment_cost" REAL /* Cost of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_treatment_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider associated with the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "reason_for_visit" TEXT /* Reason for the visit */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "prescribing_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who prescribed the medication */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_prescribing_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("prescribing_provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the lab result */,
  "lab_test" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the lab test was performed */,
  "test_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider who ordered the test */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the results were available */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_test_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the administrative user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the administrative user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrative user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrative user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrative user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrative user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_providers" (
  "patient_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-provider relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_providers_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_providers_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_treatments" (
  "diagnosis_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis-treatment relationship */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_treatments_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_treatments_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medication_orders" (
  "medication_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication order */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the medication */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the medication order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, fulfilled, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_orders_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_orders_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_result_orders" (
  "lab_result_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result order */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "lab_test" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the lab test was ordered */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_result_orders_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
